videos.title: The New Silk Road, a New Model for International Relations
videos.description: Schiller Institute founder Helga Zepp-LaRouche keynotes the Schiller Institute's conference, "Fulfilling the Dream of Mankind", in Bad Soden, Germany, November 25 & 26, 2017. For the full conference proceedings visit, http://newparadigm.schillerinstitute.com/fulfilling-dream-mankind/

videos.title: On the Ground Report from the Schiller Institute's Frankfurt Conference, November 25 & 26, 2017
videos.description: Hear LaRouche spokesman Harley Schlanger describe some of the highlights of Helga Zepp-LaRouche's remarks from the Schiller Institute's Frankfurt conference. More from the conference coming soon! Subscribe to our channel for the full conference proceedings.

videos.title: What Europe Should Contribute to the New World Paradigm
videos.description: Jacques Cheminade, former Presidential Candidate of France, delivers the keynote address on Panel III of the Schiller Institute's international conference, Fulfilling the Dream of Mankind, in Bad Soden, Germany, November 26, 2017. For the full conference proceedings visit, http://newparadigm.schillerinstitute.com/fulfilling-dream-mankind/

Doctor of Economics, MP (1994-2002) and Chairwoman of the Progressive Socialist Party of Ukraine, Dr. Natalia Vitrenko's address to the Schiller Institute's conference, "Fulfilling the Dream of Mankind", in Bad Soden, Germany, November 25 & 26, 2017. For the full conference proceedings visit, http://newparadigm.schillerinstitute.com/fulfilling-dream-mankind/

videos.title: The Economic Method of LaRouche
videos.description: Jason Ross, with the U.S. Schiller Institute, delivers the keynote address on Panel IV of the Schiller Institute's international conference, Fulfilling the Dream of Mankind, in Bad Soden, Germany, November 26, 2017. His speech is titled "The Economic Method of LaRouche: A Non-Scalar Approach to the Value of Science and Infrastructure" For the full conference proceedings visit, http://newparadigm.schillerinstitute.com/fulfilling-dream-mankind/
